heading: Right to strike preserved
label: 163 Right to strike preserved
text: Nothing in this subchapter, except as specifically provided for herein, shall be construed so as either to interfere with or impede or diminish in any way the right to strike, or to affect the limitations or qualifications on that right.
notes: Amendments1947—Act , amended section so as to provide that except as specifically provided for in this subchapter nothing shall interfere with or diminish the right to strike and that nothing was to be construed to affect the limitations or qualifications on the right to strike, thus recognizing that the right to strike is not an unlimited and unqualified right.June 23, 1947
Effective Date of 1947 AmendmentFor effective date of amendment by act , see section 104 of act , set out as a note under .June 23, 1947June 23, 1947section 151 of this title
